System.GetEnvironmentVariable.GetEnvironmentVariable Name: $'''USERPROFILE''' Value=> UserProfile
WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChrome Url: $'''https://fibex.saeplus.com/''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Maximized ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Equipo local\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
File.Delete Files: $'''%UserProfile%\\Downloads\\SaePlus v5*.xls*'''
File.Delete Files: $'''%UserProfile%\\Downloads\\Listado*.xls*'''
IF (WebAutomation.IfWebPageContains.WebPageContainsElementInState BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://fibex.saeplus.com/\'']['Anchor \'Reportes\''] State: WebAutomation.ElementState.Enabled) THEN
    CALL Subflow_1
    CALL Subflow_2
ELSE
    WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElementInState BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://fibex.saeplus.com/\'']['Input text \'login_usuario\''] State: WebAutomation.ElementState.Enabled) FOR 5
    WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://fibex.saeplus.com/\'']['Input text \'login_usuario\''] Text: $'''JOAPEREZ''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://fibex.saeplus.com/\'']['Input text \'Ingrese su Contraseña\''] Text: $'''Jose304*
''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://fibex.saeplus.com/\'']['Button \'Iniciar Sesión\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    CALL Subflow_1
    CALL Subflow_2
END
CALL Subflow_3
